narrative_beat: Medium fundação pedra antiga dourada com torre aço P&B e C carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a medium low-angle shot of an ancient stone foundation in rich gold and ochre tones, from which rises a modern tower in desaturated black-and-white steel and glass
subject.focal_point: the crimson letter C symbol at the tower's summit
subject.secondary: Falling orange embers drift across the composition; the vertical composition is dramatic.
props: ancient stone foundation in gold and ochre
modern desaturated steel and glass tower
crimson C symbol at tower summit

environment.location: a surreal landscape where past becomes present

composition.foreground: stone foundation in rich gold and ochre
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white tower against grey sky

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
